name: Yinchuan Xinhua Commercial (Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Yinchuan Xinhua Commercial (Group) Co., Ltd. engages in commercial retail business in China. It operates department stores, supermarket chains, electronic chains, hypermarkets, convenience stores, etc., which offer stationery, sporting goods, office supplies, cosmetics, washing products, clothing, shoes, textiles, hardware, computer materials, household appliances, alcohol, tobacco, non-staple food, furniture, jewelry, watches, and arts and crafts. The company operates 242 stores under the Qinghai Xin Bai, Gansu Xin Bai, Xin Bai Bai Huo, Xin Bai Lian Chao, Xin Bai Electric Appliances, and Xin Bai Logistics brands located in the central business district of Ningxia and other provinces. It also engages in leasing business. The company was formerly known as Yinchuan Xinhua Department Store Co., Ltd. The company is based in Yinchuan, China. Yinchuan Xinhua Commercial (Group) Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Wu Mei Holdings Group Co., Ltd.
